_readme: Countries file: define YOUR country/case for ogclews-link as data -- no source edit.
Copy to ogclews_countries.json (working dir), or point $OGCLEWS_COUNTRIES / --countries at it.
Every field is documented in README 'Onboarding your own country'. Required fields:
name, un_code, og_repo, gdp_musd, og_start_year, power_prefix. The packaged PHL example
does not need an entry here -- it ships in code as the worked reference.
